description: Fired when a user successfully authenticates via Google OAuth and the auth check succeeds
Fired when a user explicitly clicks the logout button
Fired when the user taps the Google sign-in button on the Login page
Fired when attendance is recorded (present, absent, or cancelled) for a subject slot
Fired when attendance is toggled off by clicking the same status again
Fired when the new-user onboarding flow finishes (subjects saved + sleep dialog dismissed)
Fired when a user saves an updated subject list from the Profile subject editor
Fired on successful submission of feedback, bug report, or suggestion from the Profile page
Fired when a user saves a new minimum attendance criteria value for a subject
Fired when a user saves a classroom location for a subject
Fired when a user saves a new sleep duration preference in Profile
Fired when a user saves changes to daily reminder or after-lecture notification settings
Fired by ErrorBoundary when an unhandled React render error is caught; includes error details
